data.body: Fix applied: implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 4 (line 792) — reviewer file paths anchored with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/implementation-plan/ prefix (eliminates ambiguous relative path resolution). HALT directive added after perspectives list: orchestrator must halt if any reviewer file cannot be read, not synthesize inline rubric. Diagnosis: Failure Mode 13 (Phantom Capability Hallucination) — bare paths resolved against non-existent plugins/dso/docs/reviewers/plan/.
